name: trap-overspecification
description: Trap: 8+ requirements in one message — tests attention to every detail
messages: Create a horizontal bar chart of CO2 per capita by country, sorted descending, with the bars colored in a red-to-green gradient based on value (high CO2 = red, low = green), add a vertical reference line at the global average, label the x-axis 'CO2 Emissions (metric tons per capita)', use the title 'Carbon Footprint by Country', and make sure tooltips are enabled
rubric: The user specifies 7+ distinct requirements. All must be addressed: (1) horizontal bar, (2) y=country sorted descending by co2_per_capita, (3) color mapped to co2_per_capita with red-green scheme, (4) rule reference line at average, (5) x-axis label, (6) title, (7) tooltip enabled. FAIL if any requirement is dropped. Most common failures: forgetting the reference line, ignoring the color gradient, or losing the sort.
